initiatives.baseline: WASD handler is a keydown-only listener attached to the canvas element (CanvasOffice.tsx lines 164-193). On each keypress it computes a single-tile delta and calls walkToTile(). If the CEO is already in WALK state with a non-empty path, the keypress is silently dropped (line 173). There is no keyup listener, no held-keys set, and no auto-queuing of the next move.
initiatives.findings: 1. The WASD listener is on the canvas element, not window. 2. Guard at line 173 prevents any input while walking. 3. Player-controlled path in characters.ts has no held-key checking. 4. walkToTile does full A* even for single-tile moves. 5. Need heldKeys Set on OfficeState. 6. One tile = 0.33s at current speed.
initiatives.recommended_approach: Add heldKeys: Set<string> to OfficeState. Move key listeners to window with input-element guard. Add keyup handler. Remove early-return guard. In updateCharacter(), after walk step completes, check heldKeys and auto-queue next tile. Add blur handler to clear heldKeys.

follow_ups.action: Add blur/visibility-change handler to clear heldKeys when tab loses focus
follow_ups.rationale: Without this, alt-tabbing while holding W would cause ghost movement

follow_ups.action: Filter keyboard events when focus is on input elements
follow_ups.rationale: Window listeners fire during text input unless filtered

initiatives.baseline: Canvas is full-map size with native browser scrolling. CAMERA_FOLLOW_LERP (0.1) and CAMERA_FOLLOW_SNAP_THRESHOLD (0.5) already defined. cameraFollowId exists on OfficeState but is never set or consumed.
initiatives.findings: CAMERA_FOLLOW_LERP and cameraFollowId are pre-existing scaffolding. Scroll container is parent div with overflow-auto. CEO screen position = ch.x * zoom, ch.y * zoom. Deadzone approach: center 40% of viewport.
initiatives.recommended_approach: Store ref to scroll container. Set cameraFollowId = CEO_ID on init. In animation loop, compute CEO screen position, compare to viewport deadzone. Lerp scrollLeft/scrollTop. Snap when close. Only scroll during WALK state.

follow_ups.rationale: Page loads at 0,0 which may not show the CEO

initiatives.baseline: processClick has three branches: agent hit, furniture hit, empty space. Empty space both deselects AND moves. Same logic duplicated in touch handler. No Escape handler exists.
initiatives.findings: Empty-space branch conflates deselection and movement. Touch handler duplicates the logic. onAgentClick('') and onItemClick(null) need to move to Escape only.
initiatives.recommended_approach: Remove deselection calls from empty-space branch (keep only walkToTile). Apply same to touch handler. Add Escape handler on window (separate useEffect) for deselection.

follow_ups.action: Unify mouse and touch click logic into shared function

initiatives.baseline: All characters drawn identically in renderScene. Only distinction is white outline for selected/hovered. isPlayerControlled exists on Character and is set correctly.
initiatives.findings: Existing outline system (getOutlineSprite) expandable for gold tint. Crown would be a small SpriteData above head. Identity plate sits above character — crown between sprite and plate.
initiatives.recommended_approach: Add CEO constants (crown color, glow alpha). In renderScene, for player-controlled: draw gold outline using existing getOutlineSprite. Add small crown SpriteData (7x5 pixel art) drawn above character head. Consider radial gradient glow at feet.

follow_ups.action: Ensure crown/glow doesn't conflict with selection outline at various zoom levels
follow_ups.rationale: Overlapping indicators could be unreadable at low zoom

initiatives.baseline: walkToTile returns boolean but return value is always ignored. No collision feedback exists. No collisionFlash field on OfficeState.
initiatives.findings: walkToTile returns false for unwalkable tile or no path. Flash state needs tile position + timer. Closest pattern is bubble fadeout timer.
initiatives.recommended_approach: Add collisionFlash: {col, row, timer} | null to OfficeState. Set on walkToTile failure. Tick in update(). Render red rect with fading alpha in renderFrame after tile grid.

initiatives.baseline: No proximity detection exists. No proximityHighlight on Character. ~6-10 characters total — O(N) check is trivial.
initiatives.findings: Manhattan or Chebyshev distance both work for 2-tile range. Boolean isNearPlayer on Character keeps renderer clean. Existing outline system reusable for subtle highlight.
initiatives.recommended_approach: Add isNearPlayer: boolean to Character. In OfficeState.update(), compute proximity to CEO. In renderScene, draw soft outline for isNearPlayer characters (gold, 0.25 alpha). Pulse slightly with sin wave.

follow_ups.action: Coordinate z-order with ceo-visual-distinction to prevent overlapping outlines
follow_ups.rationale: Multiple visual effects firing simultaneously could be visually messy
